review_title: Thanks to Appmaster, it was possible to create a product MVP without involving expensive developers.
description: The platform is really useful when you have to build a whole bunch of interconnected apps. The database design tool seemed intuitive and quick-to-use. You'll be able to integrate any service you need with modules. They make it easy to build complex workflows. You can integrate any service with the power of a click, including slack, zoom, etc. I really like their UX and they offer exceptional customer support. They help with every task, provide useful information and instructions.
author: Andrey A.
pros: The fact that you can build several apps - client facing and internal - using a single backend really makes it easy to create a whole system of apps. Once you come up with business cases, it takes just a little time to translate them into algorithms using the business process editor. The editor is drag and drop so there’s no need to have a developer by your side. The database can be built without any code as well - visual interface makes it very easy for anyone to do that.
cons: I think this will be done in the nearest future, but more design options would be wonderful to have. Right now some of the artistic stuff can not be implemented, but we were able to rethink our design and all went well.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Alexandr S.
pros: I've had a great experience with AppMaster for building web and mobile apps quickly without coding. Its visual tools for databases and logic are fantastic. It can be a bit tricky for beginners, though. It scales well for different project sizes, and the support team is super helpful. Works best if you know a bit about tech.
cons: needed time to get it. It takes week for me
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The best of the best no-code studios
author: Haji H.
pros: I really like AppMaster.io with the functionality and capabilities of which they made no-code much better and more logical. Most of all, I like that you can build logic of any complexity that you could . You can assemble a web admin panel in one click, everything is very thoughtful there, you can even track how many users there are in our application.
cons: So far, with no affluence, I can indicate that there are no templates. But given the fact that the possibilities of developing an application are endless, I definitely want to be a pro in AppMaster.io
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The best no-code platform I have used
author: Sajad A.
pros: I have been using AppMaster for a while now, and I am impressed with its features and functionality. its drag-and-drop interface makes it easy for anyone to build a professional-looking app without any coding knowledge. The platform offers a wide range of customizable templates, which can be modified to suit the specific needs of your app.Overall, AppMaster is an excellent app builder that provides a simple and effective solution for creating mobile apps. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced app developer, this platform is definitely worth considering. I highly recommend it.
cons: One thing I didn't like is that AppMaster's pricing structure is not as flexible as they would like, with certain features and functionalities only available at higher pricing tiers. This could make it difficult for some users to find a pricing plan that fits their budget and their specific needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellente plateforme pour démarrer des projets facilement !
description: J'ai débuté un projet sur AppMaster.io et je trouve la plateforme très bien conçue. Elle permet de lancer rapidement des applications sans nécessiter de compétences techniques approfondies. L'interface est globalement intuitive et les outils disponibles sont puissants, ce qui facilite grandement la gestion de projets.
author: Ouattara F.
pros: Ce que j'aime le plus chez AppMaster.io, c'est sa capacité à permettre le développement d'applications sans codage. Cette approche « no-code » rend la plateforme accessible même aux personnes sans formation technique, facilitant ainsi la création et la gestion de projets. De plus, l'interface utilisateur graphique est intuitive et conviviale, réduisant la courbe d'apprentissage et vous permettant de vous concentrer sur l'innovation et la créativité. Enfin, l'intégration d'un environnement de développement complet avec de puissants outils de débogage, de contrôle de code source et de gestion des accès garantit une expérience de développement fluide et sécurisée.
cons: Jusqu'à présent, il n'y a rien de majeur que je n'aime pas à propos de AppMaster.io. Toutefois, il serait utile d'avoir plus de documentation et de tutoriels pour les nouvelles fonctionnalités afin de maximiser l'efficacité de la plateforme. Par ailleurs, une interface utilisateur encore plus intuitive et des temps de chargement plus rapides pourraient améliorer encore davantage l'expérience utilisateur
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great solution for cost saving vs. hiring a full dev team
description: We were trying to build an app for many months coding it from scratch. We went through all imaginable issues and almost gave up when we stumbled upon AppMaster.io, which I think was just launched. It came out to be a great platform for building apps with no code. Even though it requires expertise in business logic and use cases, this thing is very useful. Totally worth its price. Amazing for non-tech founders who want something painless.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I enjoy the rich feature set and easy usability of this platform. It helped me stay on top of my project. I especially enjoy creating databases and managing complex business logic with it. It's a great tool that I'm sure other people would like too.
cons: I really hope we will see some more templates in the future so that it becomes easier to build an online store or a social network website.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

The ability to build and deploy codless web and mobile apps has been a dream I can now fulfil with Appmaster.io. It's easy to use and has got lots of features to get the job done.

review_title: A rapidly developing no code platform
description: Being on the MVP development stage, I am developing the business logic of the product: our product is planned to be a platform matching two user sides, so now we are creating both the frontends for both sides and the matching processes.
author: Evgeny B.
pros: I am currently developing an EdTech startup using the AppMaster platform for creating the MVP. I especially like the visual modeling of business logic of the developed projects, its logicality and structuredness. Would definitely recommend the platform for early stage startups for its helping to clarify the manifestation of the business model to the processes level.
cons: As the platform is really rapidly developing, some missing features can appear in real time, so it's hard to say what do I really like the least)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
